# alkemart

> Multi-vendor marketplace for Ghana — compare multi-seller prices and shop with cash on delivery.

## Site
- Home: https://alkemart-storefront.vercel.app/
- About: https://alkemart-storefront.vercel.app/about
- Contact: https://alkemart-storefront.vercel.app/contact
- Catalog: https://alkemart-storefront.vercel.app/categories/all
- Shops: https://alkemart-storefront.vercel.app/shops
- Help: https://alkemart-storefront.vercel.app/help
- Privacy: https://alkemart-storefront.vercel.app/privacy
- Sell: https://alkemart-storefront.vercel.app/sell
- Partners: https://alkemart-storefront.vercel.app/partners
- Sitemap: https://alkemart-storefront.vercel.app/sitemap.xml

## API
- Health: https://alkemart-api-production.up.railway.app/health
- Admin: https://alkemart-api-production.up.railway.app/dashboard
- Seller: https://alkemart-api-production.up.railway.app/seller

## Notes
- Buyer storefront is a Vite SPA on Vercel.
- Commerce API is Medusa/Mercur on Railway with Neon Postgres.
